name: Syniti Data Intelligence REST API
what_it_does: Syniti Data Intelligence REST API for enterprises migrating, managing, and governing data — specializing in SAP data migration, enterprise MDM, and data quality management — enabling automated data migration wave management, data quality rule execution, MDM governance, and data replication through Syniti's data intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage migration management for data migration wave planning and execution automation, handle data quality for DQ rule definition and exception management automation, access knowledge catalog for metadata discovery and business glossary automation, retrieve data replication for real-time database replication and CDC automation, manage data matching for entity resolution and duplicate detection automation, handle governance workflow for data stewardship and approval routing automation, access profiling for data structure and quality profiling automation, retrieve transformation for data mapping and conversion rule automation, manage reconciliation for source-to-target data reconciliation automation, and integrate Syniti with SAP S/4HANA, ERP systems, and cloud platforms for enterprise data intelligence automation.
use_cases: Automating SAP S/4HANA data migration waves for ERP transformation automation agents
Managing enterprise data quality rules and exception remediation for data governance agents
Orchestrating real-time data replication between operational systems for data integration agents
Profiling and cataloging enterprise data assets for metadata management automation agents
not_for: Non-SAP organizations without ERP data complexity (Syniti's strongest value is SAP data migration; simpler tools serve non-SAP needs)
Small and mid-market companies with limited data complexity (Syniti is enterprise-grade, cost-prohibitive for smaller data challenges)
Real-time analytics and BI (Syniti is data migration and quality, not analytics or BI platform)
best_when: A large enterprise undertaking SAP S/4HANA transformation or ERP migration wanting AI agents to automate data quality assessment, migration wave management, and data governance through Syniti's SAP-specialized data intelligence platform.
avoid_when: SAP SPECIALIZATION IS REQUIRED: Syniti's core value is SAP data expertise; automated general-ETL assumption creates underutilization for implementations not leveraging SAP-specific accelerators; automated should utilize SAP migration templates. ENTERPRISE AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Syniti serves large enterprises; automated open-developer assumption creates enterprise_required; Syniti licensing starts at enterprise level; automated must have Syniti agreement. MIGRATION WAVES ARE COMPLEX: SAP S/4HANA migrations require wave planning, object prioritization, and dependency mapping; automated simple-migration assumption creates migration_failure for complex SAP data models without proper wave planning; automated must leverage Syniti's migration methodology. DATA REPLICATION REQUIRES SOURCE CONNECTIVITY: Real-time CDC replication requires source database connectivity and CDC log access; automated API-only assumption creates replication_unavailable for replication requiring direct database access; automated must configure source database connections.

auth.notes: Syniti uses OAuth2 for Data Intelligence REST API. REST API with JSON. Burlington, MA HQ. Founded 1996 (as BackOffice Associates). Rebranded Syniti 2019. Investor: Advent International. Products: Syniti Data Migration (SDM), Syniti Data Quality (SDQ), Syniti Knowledge Platform (SKP), Syniti Advanced Data Migration (ADM). SAP Gold Partner. 300+ enterprise clients. Industries: manufacturing, pharma, energy, financial services. Competes with Informatica, Talend, and IBM InfoSphere for enterprise data migration and quality.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public trial; production requires Syniti enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; module-based pricing (migration, quality, replication); professional services for SAP migrations
pricing.notes: Burlington MA. Advent International backed. 300+ enterprise clients. SAP data migration specialist. Enterprise-only.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; migration and quality APIs throttled per deployment capacity

known_agent_gotchas: MIGRATION OBJECTS ARE SAP-STRUCTURED: Syniti migration objects align with SAP data objects (master data: Business Partners, Materials; transaction data: Sales Orders, Purchase Orders); automated generic-table assumption creates wrong_migration_scope for SAP objects requiring SAP-specific loading rules; automated must use SAP object-aligned migration templates

DQ RULES ARE METADATA-DRIVEN: Data quality rules are configured in Syniti's metadata repository; automated rule-per-API-call assumption creates missing_dq_enforcement for data not validated against configured DQ rules; automated must apply configured DQ rules to data before migration

RECONCILIATION IS CRITICAL FOR GO-LIVE: Source-to-target record count and value reconciliation is a migration gate; automated skip-reconciliation assumption creates go_live_risk for migrations without reconciliation validation; automated must complete reconciliation before confirming migration completion

WAVE SEQUENCING HAS DEPENDENCIES: Migration waves have data dependencies (master data before transaction data); automated parallel-wave assumption creates referential_integrity_error for transactions loaded before dependent master data; automated must respect wave sequencing order

EXCEPTION MANAGEMENT REQUIRES HUMAN REVIEW: Data quality exceptions may require human review and remediation; automated exception-free assumption creates blocked_migration for exception queues requiring human data remediation; automated must account for exception review cycles
agent_readiness.security_notes: Data migration and quality. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Enterprise SAP and ERP data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Data migration. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Enterprise SAP and ERP migration data.
